hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】Circle 获得美国信托银行批准加密货币扩张；【CRYPTO】随着周末山寨币乐观情绪增强，加密货币克服了股市疲软的影响；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)。

items.title: Circle secures U.S. trust bank approval in crypto expansion
items.summary: The approval adds to a growing list of crypto firms seeking federal banking licenses as the industry moves into the regulated financial system.
items.title_zh: Circle 获得美国信托银行批准加密货币扩张
items.summary_zh: 随着该行业进入受监管的金融体系，越来越多的加密货币公司寻求联邦银行牌照，这一批准增加了这一名单。

items.title: Crypto defies equity weakness as altcoin optimism builds into the weekend
items.summary: The price of bitcoin hit $64,400, retesting a level it failed to penetrate on Monday, with a break higher opening the path toward the June 15 peak of $67,250.
items.title_zh: 随着周末山寨币乐观情绪增强，加密货币克服了股市疲软的影响
items.summary_zh: 比特币价格触及 64,400 美元，重新测试周一未能突破的水平，突破后将触及 6 月 15 日峰值 67,250 美元。

items.title: Kevin Warsh names members of his Federal Reserve task forces, including Marc Andreessen, Doug McMillon
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh on Thursday released names of the experts who will comprise five task forces to examine the institution's operations.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周四公布了专家名单，这些专家将组成五个工作组来检查该机构的运作。

items.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.
items.title_zh: 会议记录显示，美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向存在分歧
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三发布了 6 月 16 日至 17 日会议纪要。

items.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.summary: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.
items.title_zh: 美联储会议纪要显示利率问题上的“家庭斗争”。争吵可能会持续一段时间
items.summary_zh: 在过去 35 年左右的时间里，美联储只进行一次利率调整的情况很少见，无论是上调还是下调。

items.title: Stablecoin firm Circle wins final OCC approval to open national trust bank
items.summary: Circle wins final OCC approval for First National Digital Currency Bank, with USDC reserve management planned for a later phase.
items.title_zh: 稳定币公司 Circle 获得 OCC 最终批准开设国家信托银行
items.summary_zh: Circle 获得了 OCC 对第一家国家数字货币银行的最终批准，USDC 储备管理计划在稍后阶段进行。

items.title: China Launches Reusable Rocket, Clearing a Key Hurdle in Race With SpaceX
items.summary: The launch and recovery of the Long March 10B could represent a long-awaited breakthrough for Chinese satellite companies.
items.title_zh: 中国发射可重复使用火箭，扫清与SpaceX竞争的关键障碍
items.summary_zh: 长征十号B的发射和回收可能代表着中国卫星公司期待已久的突破。

items.title: Bitcoin's $60,000-$70,000 range becomes third most traded range in history
items.summary: Bitcoin has spent 307 days in the $60,000-$70,000 range, the third longest consolidation in any $10,000 price band.
items.title_zh: 比特币 60,000 美元至 70,000 美元区间成为历史上第三大交易区间
items.summary_zh: 比特币在 60,000 美元至 70,000 美元区间内已经呆了 307 天，这是所有 10,000 美元价格区间中第三长的盘整时间。

items.title: Ledger researchers disclose Tangem card flaw; Tangem says risk to everyday users is ‘virtually non-existent’
items.summary: Ledger researchers disclosed a laser attack that resets Tangem card passwords by bypassing a recovery-state check in the firmware.
items.title_zh: Ledger 研究人员披露了 Tangem 卡缺陷； Tangem 表示，日常用户的风险“几乎不存在”
items.summary_zh: Ledger 研究人员披露了一种激光攻击，该攻击可以绕过固件中的恢复状态检查来重置 Tangem 卡密码。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
items.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.
items.title_zh: 中国通过 Anthropic 的克劳德代码警告人工智能风险
items.summary_zh: 中国表示，克劳德代码的特定版本存在后门漏洞，可以将敏感信息发送到远程服务器。

items.title: Traders on Kalshi think the Nasdaq-100 will end 2026 above 30,000, predicting a cooler second half of the year
items.summary: Speculators think the massive rally in the Nasdaq-100 since the lows following the U.S.-Iran war will be more subdued in the second half of 2026.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 交易员认为纳斯达克 100 指数到 2026 年年底将突破 30,000 点，并预测今年下半年会更加凉爽
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为，纳斯达克 100 指数自美伊战争后低点以来的大幅上涨将在 2026 年下半年受到抑制。

items.title: Palestinians mourn Gaza World Cup screenings organiser killed in Israeli strike
items.summary: Aid worker Mohammed al-Wahidi had become a prominent humanitarian figure during the Israel-Hamas war.
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦人哀悼在以色列袭击中丧生的加沙世界杯放映组织者
items.summary_zh: 援助工作者穆罕默德·瓦希迪在以色列-哈马斯战争期间成为了一位杰出的人道主义人物。

items.title: Ex-Olympian pleads not guilty to Reflecting Pool vandalism charges
items.summary: A former US Olympian canoeist denies accusations that he deliberately damaged the lining of the refurbished Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
items.title_zh: 前奥运选手对倒影池破坏行为指控不认罪
items.summary_zh: 一名前美国奥林匹克皮划艇运动员否认了有关他故意损坏翻新的林肯纪念堂倒影池内衬的指控。

items.title: Moscow Still Has Art and Culture. Just Don’t Say ‘Ukraine.’
items.summary: An eerie limbo prevails at small art shows, independent theaters and private political clubs, where the war is the elephant in the room.
items.title_zh: 莫斯科仍然拥有艺术和文化。只是不要说“乌克兰”。
items.summary_zh: 小型艺术展、独立剧院和私人政治俱乐部普遍存在一种令人毛骨悚然的不稳定状态，战争是房间里的大象。

items.title: Meet Neil, Australia’s Celebrity Seal
items.summary: The young elephant seal has gained fans around the world. But the authorities warn he could be in danger of being loved to death.
items.title_zh: 来认识一下澳大利亚的名人印章尼尔
items.summary_zh: 年轻的象海豹赢得了世界各地的粉丝。但当局警告他可能面临被爱致死的危险。

items.title: Polymarket seeks approval to bring margin trading to U.S. customers
items.summary: Polymarket's application to allow users to take positions that are not fully collateralized follows authorization granted to rival Kalshi in March.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 寻求批准向美国客户提供保证金交易
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 在 3 月份向竞争对手 Kalshi 授予授权后，申请允许用户持有未完全抵押的头寸。

items.title: XRP up 2% as buyers push through $1.10 resistance
items.summary: A late-session volume surge carried XRP above its recent range, with traders now watching whether $1.10 can hold as support.
items.title_zh: 随着买家突破 1.10 美元阻力位，XRP 上涨 2%
items.summary_zh: 尾盘交易量激增，XRP 突破近期区间，交易员现在关注 1.10 美元是否能保持支撑位。

items.title: Revolut integrates its crypto exchange with AI assistants as agentic trading spreads
items.summary: Revolut X now connects to Claude, Gemini, OpenClaw, and Cursor, letting crypto users analyze, backtest, and execute trades via AI prompts.
items.title_zh: Revolut 将其加密货币交易所与人工智能助手集成作为代理交易点差
items.summary_zh: Revolut X 现在连接到 Claude、Gemini、OpenClaw 和 Cursor，让加密货币用户通过人工智能提示进行分析、回测和执行交易。

items.title: DOJ charges federal inmate over alleged theft of $290,000 in crypto forfeited to US government
items.summary: Federal inmate Rossen Iossifov faces new charges for allegedly taking $290,000 in government-forfeited cryptocurrency.
items.title_zh: DOJ 指控联邦囚犯涉嫌盗窃美国政府没收的 29 万美元加密货币
items.summary_zh: 联邦囚犯 Rossen Iossifov 因涉嫌收受政府没收的 29 万美元加密货币而面临新指控。

items.title: UK Labour MPs push to permanently ban crypto political donations
items.summary: Labour MPs are gathering support for proposed amendments to a key bill that would permanently ban crypto political donations.
items.title_zh: 英国工党议员推动​​永久禁止加密政治捐款
items.summary_zh: 工党议员正在收集对一项关键法案拟议修正案的支持，该法案将永久禁止加密货币政治捐款。

items.title: Polymarket files applications to offer regulated margin trading in US
items.summary: Polymarket's rival platform, Kalshi, already received US regulatory approval to provide margin trading back in March.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 提交申请在美国提供受监管的保证金交易
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 的竞争对手平台 Kalshi 早在 3 月份就已获得美国监管机构批准提供保证金交易。

items.title_zh: PRX 第 4 部分：我们的数据策略

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all
items.summary: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
items.title_zh: 迈向一个让所有人都能受益于神经技术的未来
items.summary_zh: 博士生 Rachel Sava 是“展望计算未来”奖的获得者，她探索了神经技术的变革性改进和反乌托邦风险。

items.title: Fighting Fires With Figures, These Experts Are Trying to Stop Europe from Burning
items.summary: A team of engineers, foresters and scientists is helping the continent prepare for wildfires from a giant science park in Italy. Their arsenal includes satellites, weather models and expert analysis.
items.title_zh: 用数字救火，这些专家试图阻止欧洲燃烧
items.summary_zh: 一支由工程师、林业工作者和科学家组成的团队正在意大利的一个巨型科学园帮助非洲大陆为野火做好准备。他们的武器库包括卫星、天气模型和专家分析。

items.title: Japan's 'invest locally' plan likely to spur demand for assets like bitcoin, gold
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 10, 2026
items.title_zh: 日本的“本地投资”计划可能会刺激对比特币、黄金等资产的需求
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 10 日天气预报

items.title: Metaplanet explores bringing bitcoin-backed digital credit to Japan
items.summary: The bitcoin treasury company is working with JPYC and Progmat to explore tokenized credit products backed by bitcoin, aiming to create efficient, 24/7 credit markets in Japan.
items.title_zh: Metaplanet 探索将比特币支持的数字信贷引入日本
items.summary_zh: 这家比特币财务公司正在与 JPYC 和 Progmat 合作探索由比特币支持的代币化信贷产品，旨在在日本创建高效的 24/7 信贷市场。

items.title: Bitcoin gets a green light from a reliable momentum gauge. Here are key levels to watch
items.summary: A smoother long-term MACD just flipped bullish, pointing to more upside. Here are key levels that will decide if the ongoing bounce turns into a full blown uptrend.
items.title_zh: 比特币获得了可靠动量指标的批准。以下是值得关注的关键级别
items.summary_zh: 更加平滑的长期 MACD 刚刚转为看涨，表明还有更多上涨空间。以下关键水平将决定当前的反弹是否会转变为全面的上升趋势。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin tops $64,000 as selling pressure on Coinbase eases
items.summary: Spot bitcoin funds lost about $95 million on Thursday and ether funds roughly $52 million, ending the one bright spot in crypto's institutional flows even as prices rallied.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：随着 Coinbase 抛售压力缓解，比特币突破 64,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 周四，现货比特币基金损失了约 9500 万美元，以太坊基金损失了约 5200 万美元，尽管价格上涨，但结束了加密货币机构流动的一个亮点。

items.title: Bitcoin's quiet split: Strong in USD, lagging in JPY as Yen rises on intervention fears
items.summary: A sharp rise in the yen has left bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies underperforming in yen terms compared with their dollar-based trading pairs.
items.title_zh: 比特币悄然分裂：美元走强，日元落后，因干预担忧导致日元上涨
items.summary_zh: 日元大幅升值导致比特币和其他主要加密货币以日元计算，与以美元为基础的交易对相比表现不佳。

items.title: New Hampshire’s $100 million bitcoin bond proposal fails to pass final vote
items.summary: Governor Ayotte had expressed support for the proposal, touting it as an innovative way to bring more investment opportunities to the state.
items.title_zh: 新罕布什尔州1亿美元比特币债券提案未能通过最终投票
items.summary_zh: 州长阿约特对该提案表示支持，称其为为该州带来更多投资机会的创新方式。

items.title: Bitwise says bitcoin’s ‘floor is rising’ despite AI boom and regulatory delays
items.summary: Bitwise says institutions are buying the bitcoin bear market dip, while many larger investors are still awaiting regulatory clarity.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 表示，尽管人工智能蓬勃发展且监管延迟，但比特币的“下限正在上升”
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 表示，机构正在比特币熊市下跌时买入，而许多大型投资者仍在等待监管的明确性。

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 现在是 Microsoft 365 Copilot 中的首选模型
items.summary_zh: 了解 GPT-5.6 如何为 Microsoft 365 Copilot 提供更强大的跨 Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Chat 和 Cowork 的 AI 功能，从而实现更快、更高质量的工作。

items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
items.title_zh: 我们与政府和国家安全伙伴关系的方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何处理政府和国家安全伙伴关系，以及负责任的人工智能使用、民主问责和公共安全的原则。

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
items.title_zh: 在编码评估中将信号与噪声分离
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 的一项新分析揭示了流行的编码基准 SWE-Bench Pro 中的问题，引发了人们对评估 AI 模型的可靠性和准确性的担忧。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Live
items.summary: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.
items.title_zh: GPT-Live 简介
items.summary_zh: 用于自然人机交互的新一代语音模型，现已为 ChatGPT 语音提供支持。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Prediction markets spark insider trading concerns. Here's how Goldman and other companies are responding
items.summary: CNBC reached out to 50 companies about what are their trading policies for employees on prediction markets. A handful had an answer.
items.title_zh: 预测市场引发内幕交易担忧。以下是高盛和其他公司的回应
items.summary_zh: CNBC 联系了 50 家公司，了解他们在预测市场上的员工交易政策。少数人给出了答案。

items.title: Kalshi traders think gas prices will stay higher for longer as U.S.-Iran tensions heat back up
items.summary: Odds that gas prices are above $3.50 on Election Day have jumped to 75% on the platform.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商认为，随着美伊紧张局势升温，天然气价格将在更长时间内保持较高水平
items.summary_zh: 在该平台上，选举日汽油价格高于 3.50 美元的可能性已跃升至 75%。

items.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
items.summary: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers such as Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.
items.title_zh: 高盛与 Verizon、Lockheed Martin 赢得 700 亿美元资产管理交易
items.summary_zh: 高盛、贝莱德、罗素投资和美世等管理公司在数万亿美元的退休资产市场上的竞争非常激烈。

items.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
items.summary: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 押注体育博彩公司 DraftKings 和 Flutter，认为预测市场受到监管限制
items.summary_zh: 该投资者认为，在新贵的竞争给体育博彩公司的股票带来压力之后，监管机构最终将打击预测市场。

items.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
items.summary: Speculators now see just a 43% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预测，在经历了最近的挫折后，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到 2027 年才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 投机者现在认为交通流量在 12 月 1 日之前恢复正常的可能性只有 43%。

items.title: Huge crowds in Mashhad as Iran's late supreme leader is buried
items.summary: Ali Khamenei was buried at the Imam Reza shrine, Iran's holiest Shia Muslim site, ending six days of public mourning ceremonies.
items.title_zh: 伊朗已故最高领导人下葬时，马什哈德聚集了大批人群
items.summary_zh: 阿里·哈梅内伊被安葬在伊朗最神圣的什叶派穆斯林圣地伊玛目礼萨圣地，结束了为期六天的公众哀悼仪式。

items.title: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
items.summary: Two men with links to Ukraine's security services are accused of killing Anastasiia Berezovska and dumping her body in woods.
items.title_zh: 被指控谋杀摩纳哥炸弹嫌疑人的乌克兰特工改变了故事
items.summary_zh: 两名与乌克兰安全部门有联系的男子被指控杀害阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡并将她的尸体扔在树林里。

items.title: East Asia braces for destructive typhoon as landslides kill 15 in Philippines
items.summary: Headed for Taiwan and south-eastern China, the 1,000 km-wide Bavi is forecast to be one of the strongest storms in decades.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾山体滑坡造成15人死亡，东亚地区正准备迎接破坏性台风
items.summary_zh: 宽达 1,000 公里的巴威预计将前往台湾和中国东南部，成为数十年来最强的风暴之一。

items.title: China lands reusable rocket for first time, state media says
items.summary: It follows similar landings of reusable rockets by US-owned companies SpaceX and Blue Origin.
items.title_zh: 官方媒体称中国首次实现可重复使用火箭着陆
items.summary_zh: 此前，美国公司 SpaceX 和 Blue Origin 也曾进行过类似的可重复使用火箭着陆。

items.title: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in mega US share sale
items.summary: The shares are set to start trading on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest ever debut by a foreign firm.
items.title_zh: 芯片巨头 SK 海力士在美国大规模发售股票筹集 265 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该股将于周五在纳斯达克开始交易，这将是外国公司有史以来规模最大的首次公开募股。

items.title: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
items.summary: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰在克里米亚附近袭击俄罗斯船只，对燃料供应的袭击升级
items.summary_zh: 这些袭击似乎是乌克兰试图切断进出被占领克里米亚的供应和路线的最新阶段。

items.title: Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
items.summary: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".
items.title_zh: 民主党人格雷厄姆·普拉特纳因袭击指控而暂停美国参议院关键竞选活动
items.summary_zh: 这一决定是在一名妇女指控他性侵犯几天后做出的，他说这一指控“绝对是错误的”。

items.title: Greek F-16 fighter jet crash-lands at busy Zakynthos airport
items.summary: The runway is closed after the jet reportedly landed without deploying its landing gear before bursting into flames.
items.title_zh: 希腊F-16战斗机在繁忙的扎金索斯机场迫降
items.summary_zh: 据报道，这架飞机在没有展开起落架的情况下着陆并起火，导致跑道关闭。

items.title: Iran’s Supreme Leader Remains Absent, a Void at the Top of the Regime
items.summary: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei did not appear at his father’s funeral this week, fueling speculation about his physical condition and leaving a power vacuum in a divided country.
items.title_zh: 伊朗最高领袖仍然缺席，政权高层出现空缺
items.summary_zh: 阿亚图拉·莫吉塔巴·哈梅内伊本周没有出席父亲的葬礼，这引发了人们对他身体状况的猜测，并在这个分裂的国家留下了权力真空。

items.title: After Venezuela Earthquakes, a Youth Baseball League Counts the Dead
items.summary: Children who played for Venezuela’s youth baseball league, a symbol of national pride, have been left injured, orphaned or dead.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震后，青年棒球联盟清点死亡人数
items.summary_zh: 为委内瑞拉青年棒球联盟（民族自豪感的象征）效力的孩子们受伤、成为孤儿或死亡。

items.title: At Least 11 People Die in Southern Spain Wildfire
items.summary: The blaze in Andalusia prompted a major containment operation. Heat waves across Europe this summer have raised the risk of such fires, forecasters say.
items.title_zh: 西班牙南部山火至少11人死亡
items.summary_zh: 安达卢西亚的大火引发了大规模的遏制行动。预报员称，今年夏天欧洲各地的热浪增加了发生此类火灾的风险。

items.title: Mediators Trying to Pull U.S. and Iran Back From Brink, Officials Say
items.summary: Days of strikes by the two countries have given way to an uneasy pause as Qatari mediators seek to salvage the tattered U.S.-Iran truce.
items.title_zh: 官员称，调解人试图将美国和伊朗从悬崖边拉回来
items.summary_zh: 随着卡塔尔调解人试图挽救破碎的美伊休战协议，两国连续数日的罢工已被令人不安的停顿所取代。

items.title: Can Hungarian Holocaust Survivors Find Justice in the U.S.?
items.summary: For more than a decade, a group of survivors have fought a legal battle to get American courts to hear their suit against Hungary’s national railroad over its role in the atrocities.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利大屠杀幸存者能在美国找到正义吗？
items.summary_zh: 十多年来，一群幸存者一直在打一场法律战，要求美国法院审理他们针对匈牙利国家铁路在暴行中所扮演角色的诉讼。

items.title: Indian Diaspora, Now the Largest Foreign-Born Group in Australia, Welcomes Modi
items.summary: A large, festive reception for the Indian prime minister in Melbourne belied tensions over migration in the country.
items.title_zh: 印度侨民现在是澳大利亚最大的外国出生群体，欢迎莫迪
items.summary_zh: 印度总理在墨尔本举行的大型节日招待会掩盖了该国因移民问题而出现的紧张局势。

items.title: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest buys $14 million worth of Circle, offloads Robinhood shares
items.summary: Circle Internet Group's stock dropped 1.65% during Thursday's trading session, extending its one-month decline to 20.2%.
items.title_zh: Cathie Wood 的 Ark Invest 收购了价值 1400 万美元的 Circle，并出售 Robinhood 股票
items.summary_zh: Circle Internet Group 股价在周四交易时段下跌 1.65%，将一个月跌幅扩大至 20.2%。

items.title: North Carolina passes bill recognizing CFTC preemption over prediction markets
items.summary: North Carolina's new law taxes prediction market platforms at 6% of their net trading fee revenue that is attributable to North Carolina residents.
items.title_zh: 北卡罗来纳州通过法案承认 CFTC 对预测市场的优先权
items.summary_zh: 北卡罗来纳州的新法律对预测市场平台征税，税率为归属于北卡罗来纳州居民的净交易费收入的 6%。

items.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
items.summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.
items.title_zh: 德国电信如何利用人工智能重新布线电信
items.summary_zh: 德国电信如何通过 OpenAI 成为一家人工智能原生电信公司——改变客户服务、员工工作流程、网络运营和语音的未来。

items.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
items.summary: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6：前沿智能，随您的雄心壮志而扩展
items.summary_zh: 每个代币都提供更多的智能，每美元的性能更强，并且为您最艰苦的工作提供更多所需的功能。

items.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
items.summary: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 现在是您最雄心勃勃的工作的合作伙伴
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT Work 是一个代理，可以跨您的应用程序和文件采取行动，如果需要，可以在项目上停留数小时，并将目标转化为完成的工作。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.summary: Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 生物错误赏金
items.summary_zh: 有关 OpenAI Bio 赏金计划的详细信息

items.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
items.summary: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.
items.title_zh: 帮助 K-12 教育工作者培养实用的人工智能技能
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Academy 和 Walton Family Foundation 正在推出 AI 技能实践实践活动，帮助 K-12 教育工作者在课堂上培养实用的 AI 技能。

items.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
items.summary: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.
items.title_zh: MUFG 旨在通过 OpenAI 成为人工智能原生
items.summary_zh: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建人工智能原生组织、改进工作流程并大规模提供新的人工智能驱动的金融服务。

items.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 3): Attention is all you profile
items.title_zh: PyTorch 中的分析（第 3 部分）：注意力就是您的分析

items.title: Data for Agents
items.title_zh: 代理商数据

items.title: From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click
items.title_zh: 一键从 Hugging Face 到 Amazon SageMaker Studio

items.title: Run AI workloads on any cloud, store on Hugging Face: zero-egress storage with SkyPilot
items.title_zh: 在任何云上运行 AI 工作负载，存储在 Hugging Face 上：使用 SkyPilot 实现零出口存储

items.title: LeRobot v0.6.0: Imagine, Evaluate, Improve
items.title_zh: 乐机器人v0.6.0：想象、评估、改进

items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.title_zh: Hugging Face 和 Cerebras 将 Gemma 4 引入实时语音 AI

items.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等
items.summary_zh: 我们宣布在 Gemini API 中的托管代理中提供新功能，以便开发人员可以构建可靠的、可用于生产的代理。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：为美国未来 250 年进行创新和教育
items.summary_zh: 在与亚利桑那州立大学校长迈克尔·克劳 (Michael Crow) 举行的“华盛顿邮报直播”小组讨论中，校长萨莉·科恩布鲁斯 (Sally Kornbluth) 探讨了大学如何培养下一代科学家，以引领美国快速变化的技术格局。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.
items.title_zh: 问答：今天的代理人工智能是什么？我们希望它是什么？
items.summary_zh: 计算机科学家 Phillip Isola 打破了炒作，解释了人工智能代理的工作原理以及这项快速发展的技术的未来。

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。
